title: senecio schoenemanni
intro: Senecio schoenemanni is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and commonly known as devil's bush. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio schoenemanni include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and potentially inhibiting the growth of certain cancer cells. Herbal preparations of Senecio schoenemanni are typically made from the leaves and stems of the plant, which can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
